ICDMapAgent - Class in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.icdmap
Maps SNOMED CT ID (conceptId) to ICD-10 code.

init() - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.agent.DISBAgent
The method will configure the properties to default values.
Protocol for sending request to DISB (default protocol: http).
Hostname for remote application DISB (default hostname: localhost).
Port for accessing on port to DISB (default port: 9090).
Context for requesting to DISB (default context: dis).
Location for logs.
init() - Method in interface in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.api.IDISBAgent
The method will configure the properties to default values.
Protocol for sending request to DISB (default protocol: http).
Hostname for remote application DISB (default hostname: localhost).
Port for accessing on port to DISB (default port: 9090).
Context for requesting to DISB (default context: dis).
Location for logs.
init() - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.service.ImportService
The method will configure the properties to default values
init(String, String, Integer, Integer, Integer) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.service.ImportService
The method will configure properties by values provided in parameters

The method will configure properties by values provided in parameters
init(String, String, Integer, String, String) - Method in interface in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.api.IDISBAgent
